## 🎯 What's Included in Each Section

### 01 — Niche Positioning & ICP
- Category of One positioning statement
- 4 detailed ICP profiles with psychographics
- Pain-first and outcome-first messaging themes
- Competitive differentiation matrix
- Pricing and packaging recommendations

### 02 — Google & Bing SEO Strategy
- Technical SEO audit checklist (Core Web Vitals, schema, architecture)
- Keyword universe with 6 topic clusters
- Programmatic SEO plan (480+ pages)
- 7 types of schema markup implementation
- URL structure and content velocity plan

### 03 — AI Search (AEO/GEO)
- Entity authority framework
- LLM citation strategy (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude)
- 4 content pillars for AI visibility
- Perplexity-specific optimization (3-5 pieces/week)
- Prompt testing protocol (50 variations/week)

### 04 — Backlink Generation
- 4-tier link building strategy
- Digital PR campaign ideas (4/quarter)
- Free tool launch plan (2/quarter)
- Guest post strategy (4/month)
- Podcast appearance strategy (20/year)
- Outreach email templates

### 05 — Content Plan for AI Visibility
- Definitional, comparative, statistical, tutorial pillars
- Perplexity optimization tactics
- LLM prompt testing calendar
- AI citation tracking methodology
- Weekly content calendar

### 06 — Content Plan for Search
- 6 major topic clusters with pillar pages
- Editorial calendar: 1 pillar/month, 8-12 cluster posts/month
- 50-100 programmatic pages/month
- Keyword mapping for each cluster
- Content distribution strategy

### 07 — LinkedIn Lead Gen
- Founder daily posting schedule (Mon-Sat)
- 5-touch outreach sequence
- Sales Navigator targeting (CMO/VP, 50-500 employees)
- LinkedIn Groups strategy
- Personal brand positioning

### 08 — Reddit Strategy
- 10 target subreddits (r/SEO, r/marketing, r/SaaS, etc.)
- 30-60 day trust-building protocol
- Daily commenting strategy
- Case study post templates
- AMA calendar (quarterly)
- Free tool drop strategy

### 09 — Social Media Strategy
- X/Twitter playbook (3-5 posts/day)
- YouTube playbook (weekly 8-15 min videos)
- TikTok playbook (1x daily)
- Instagram playbook (carousels + Reels)
- Content repurposing engine (1→5 formats)

### 10 — Search Ads (Google + Bing)
- Campaign structure (Search, Display, Remarketing)
- Keyword bidding strategy
- Landing page recommendations
- Budget allocation framework
- A/B testing protocol

### 11 — Other Channel Ads
- Meta Ads playbook (Facebook + Instagram)
- LinkedIn Ads playbook (Sponsored Content, Lead Gen)
- Reddit Ads playbook (subreddit targeting)
- Budget allocation across channels
- Creative brief templates

### 12 — Unique Marketing Methods
- 10 unconventional growth tactics
- Free tool marketing strategy
- Data-driven PR (4 research studies/year)
- Strategic partnership framework
- Ambassador/influencer program
- Viral loop mechanics

### 13 — Competitor Outranking
- Competitor analysis matrix (Jasper, SurferSEO, HubSpot, etc.)
- Content gap analysis
- Keyword stealing strategy
- Backlink gap analysis
- Feature comparison and differentiation
- Review and reputation strategy (G2, Capterra, Product Hunt)

### 14 — 90-Day Launch Timeline
- Phase 1 (Days 1-30): Foundation
- Phase 2 (Days 31-60): Acceleration
- Phase 3 (Days 61-90): Scale
- Weekly milestones and deliverables
- Resource allocation (team, budget, tools)
- Success metrics and KPIs per phase
- Risk mitigation strategies

## 🚀 How to Use These Deliverables

1. **Start with Section 01** (Positioning) — Align team on messaging
2. **Review Section 14** (Timeline) — Set weekly execution cadence
3. **Parallel execution** — SEO (02), Content (05-06), Social (07-09) can run simultaneously
4. **Phase in paid** (10-11) once organic foundations are set
5. **Track progress** using the KPIs defined in each section
